title: Rubrik Secures and Accelerates AI Agents on Google Cloud
full_text: New Rubrik Agent Cloud Integration with Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform provides a unified control layer for AI agent operations PALO ALTO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Apr. 22, 2026-- Rubrik (NYSE: RBRK), the Security and AI Operations company, today launched Rubrik Agent Cloud (RAC) for Gemini Enter.
